# All Star Sprinkler Systems, Inc.

Premier irrigation, drainage, and landscape lighting services in Central Louisiana (CENLA).

## Core Services
- Irrigation Installation (Trenchless): Zero-damage installation technology.
- Irrigation Repair: Fast diagnostics and fixes for all major brands.
- Landscape Lighting: Energy-efficient LED architectural and safety lighting.
- Drainage Installation: French drains and catch basins to prevent flooding.
- Boring: Horizontal boring under sidewalks and driveways without cutting concrete.

## Service Area
- Pineville, LA
- Alexandria, LA
- Ball, LA
- Leesville, LA
- Natchitoches, LA

## Business Details
- Years in Business: 15+
- Rating: 4.9/5 stars
- Specialization: Trenchless (No Dig) Installation
